case_title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. WILFRIDO JESUS CRUZ

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK MURRAY FILED BY VASQUEZ, RAUL CRUZ, WILFRIDO JESUS
DECLARATION OF THE DEFENDANT REQUESTING SPANISH INTERPRETER ON SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. FILED BY DEFENDANT CRUZ, WILFRIDO JESUS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $20.00) SERVED MAY-27-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, WILFRIDO JESUS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-15-2010 - CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT ORDERED TO BRING HIS OWN INTERPRETER. NOTE PLAINTIFF OBJECTS TO CONTINUANCE BECAUSE SAYS DEFENDANT KNEW FROM THEIR PRIOR SMALL CLAIMS CASE THAT AN INTERPRETER IS REQUIRED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK MURRAY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, RAUL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CRUZ, WILFRIDO JESUS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, WILFRIDO JESUS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-15-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
CONTINUED ORDER RETURNED UNCLAIMED SENT TO DEFENDANT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT WILFRIDO JESUS CRUZ, RETURNED "NO SUCH NUMBER/UNABLE TO FORWARD". .

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-20-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED.. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER STEPHAN ENOCH PRESENT ON DEFENDAN'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
